# Architecture Overview

## Tech Stack

| Layer       | Technology                       | Version |
| ----------- | -------------------------------- | ------- |
| Runtime     | Node.js                          | 20.x    |
| Language    | TypeScript                       | 5.9.2   |
| Framework   | NestJS                           | 11.0.0  |
| API         | GraphQL (Apollo Server)          | 5.4.0   |
| GraphQL Lib | @nestjs/graphql + @nestjs/apollo | 13.2.4  |
| Database    | MongoDB (Mongoose ODM)           | 9.2.4   |
| Caching     | Redis (cache-manager)            | 7.2.8   |
| Monorepo    | Nx                               | 22.5.4  |
| Build       | Webpack (via @nx/webpack)        | —       |
| Testing     | Jest                             | 30.0.2  |
| Linting     | ESLint 9 + Prettier              | 3.6.2   |
| Package Mgr | Yarn                             | —       |

## Project Structure

```
copilot-governance-starter/    ← Nx workspace root
├── apps/
│   ├── api/                   ← NestJS application
│   │   └── src/
│   │       ├── main.ts        ← Bootstrap + listen on port 3000
│   │       ├── app/
│   │       │   ├── app.module.ts      ← Root module (GraphQL, Mongoose, Cache, Config)
│   │       │   ├── app.controller.ts  ← Health / root endpoint
│   │       │   └── app.service.ts     ← Root service
│   │       └── items/
│   │           ├── items.module.ts    ← Feature module
│   │           ├── items.resolver.ts  ← GraphQL resolver (queries + mutations)
│   │           ├── items.service.ts   ← Business logic + cache-aside pattern
│   │           ├── dto/               ← Input types (CreateItemInput, UpdateItemInput)
│   │           └── schemas/           ← Mongoose schema (Item)
│   └── api-e2e/               ← End-to-end test project
│       └── src/
│           ├── api/api.spec.ts
│           └── support/       ← Global setup / teardown
├── docs/
│   ├── ai-pipeline/           ← AI governance prompts
│   └── architecture/          ← Architecture documentation
├── nx.json                    ← Nx workspace configuration
├── package.json               ← Dependencies and scripts
├── tsconfig.base.json         ← Base TypeScript configuration
└── jest.config.ts             ← Root Jest configuration
```

## Architecture Pattern

Modular Monolith — single deployable NestJS application with feature modules.

Each feature module encapsulates its own resolver, service, DTOs, and schemas.

The root `AppModule` composes all feature modules and configures cross-cutting concerns
(GraphQL, MongoDB, Redis cache, environment configuration).

## Data Flow

```
HTTP Request
  → Apollo Server (port 3000, /graphql)
    → @Resolver (query/mutation dispatch)
      → Service (business logic)
        → Cache check (Redis, 60s TTL)
          → hit: return cached data
          → miss: Mongoose Model → MongoDB
            → cache result → return
```

**Cache-aside pattern**: Services check Redis before querying MongoDB.
On writes, relevant cache keys are invalidated.

## Infrastructure

| Concern        | Implementation                                                 |
| -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Database       | MongoDB via Mongoose (`MONGODB_URI` from env)                  |
| Caching        | Redis via cache-manager-redis-yet (`REDIS_HOST/PORT/PASSWORD`) |
| Configuration  | @nestjs/config with `.env` file (isGlobal)                     |
| API Playground | GraphQL Playground (disabled in production)                    |
| Schema         | Code-first auto-generated (`schema.gql`)                       |
| Port           | `PORT` env variable, default 3000                              |
